name: Wasteland War-Raptor
visual_description: A muscular tawny-furred lion-headed humanoid in a full sprint, wielding a crude sharpened blade, running alongside a dust-colored raptor dinosaur with slate-grey striping. Both creatures charge forward in violent motion, weapons raised, through a barren wasteland of cracked earth and sparse rock.
full_prompt: A muscular tawny-furred lion-headed humanoid in a full sprint, wielding a crude sharpened blade, running alongside a dust-colored raptor dinosaur with slate-grey striping. Both creatures charge forward in violent motion, weapons raised, through a barren wasteland of cracked earth and sparse rock.. Stylized digital illustration, dynamic tilted composition, warm fire-tones with high contrast, kinetic energy, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
